channel.title: Linux Workflow on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist
channel.description: Recent content in Linux Workflow on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist

item.title: Arch/Sway: Manually Hacking the GTK File Chooser for Ultimate Workflow Speed
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Learn to manually configure the GTK File Chooser Dialog's bookmarks and settings in Arch Linux and Sway. Ditch the visual tools for ultimate workflow efficiency.
